name: Perfectly Lumpy Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 pounds baking potatoes, peeled (if not well scrubbed)
1 teaspoon freshly ground black pepper (plus more to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy pot, cover the potatoes with cold water. Stir in 2 teaspoons of salt and bring to a boil over medium heat.
2. Lower the heat slightly, partially cover, and cook until the potatoes are very tender, about 25 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, bring the milk just to a simmer. Stir in the butter, 2 teaspoons of salt, and 1 teaspoon of freshly ground black pepper. Cover and remove from the heat.
4. Drain the potatoes and return them to the pot. Mash with a wooden spoon (or electric mixer) leaving some lumps.
5. Return the pot to low heat and whisk in the heated milk mixture. Beat until light and fluffy.
6. Adjust seasoning and serve immediately.
For mashed sweet potatoes, substitute an equal weight of peeled, chunked yams.
